body.title: CLOSED: Audit Igor config/paths/logging — what stays vs. generalizes to datacenter
body.result: all 7 files stay in Igor; logging_setup.py dead igor.network handler removed; decision doc written
body.description:
Igor has config.py, paths.py, logging_setup.py, boot_check.py, env_sync.py, restart_guard.py, first_start.py. Some of these are Igor-specific (paths.py for Igor's instance dirs), some are generic infrastructure (restart_guard, logging setup) that could live in agent_datacenter. Audit each, decide keep-in-Igor vs. generalize-to-datacenter.

**Affected files:** wild_igor/igor/config.py, paths.py, logging_setup.py, boot_check.py, env_sync.py, restart_guard.py, first_start.py
**Design rules:** no-sqlite
**Scope boundary:** Audit + decision + ticket any moves. No implementation in this ticket.
**Test plan:** Produce a one-page decision doc: each file, keep vs. move, reasoning.
